title: The Stranger's Tuesday
description: Placeholder Season for the foundation milestone. Contains a single sample vignette so the content pipeline can be exercised end-to-end. Real Season 1 content lands under T-CONTENT-002 (M1) and the full Season 1 writing is M2 scope per docs/10_Roadmap_Milestones.md.

vignettes.setting_beat: The kitchen light is already on. Someone has been crying recently and pretended not to. The kettle is half full from the night before.

choices.label: Boil the kettle and sit with it

weights.rationale: Choosing presence over distraction in the morning suggests lower reactivity to ambient emotional cues.
Sitting with someone's residue is a quiet care move.

choices.label: Empty the kettle and start fresh

weights.rationale: A small reset of state — conscientious cleanup behavior.
Erasing the trace of someone else's distress rather than acknowledging it is a mild avoidant signal.

choices.label: Leave the kitchen and come back later

weights.rationale: Choosing not to engage with shared space reduces the agreeableness signal.
Stronger avoidant pattern — physical removal from the emotional context.

resolution_beats.choice-1: The kettle clicks off. Outside, a bus passes. You can hear it but you don't look.
resolution_beats.choice-2: You rinse the kettle. The water tastes of nothing in particular.
resolution_beats.choice-3: When you come back, the light is still on, but the room is somehow further away.
